message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'sk_buff.tail' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=sk_buff;field=tail;offset=184] [oracle:assert=tail holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
